goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what types of conversions are supported
List available length units for measuring workspace dimensions and furniture
Get detailed help on length conversions for accurate workspace planning
Convert room dimensions from imperial to metric for international furniture ordering
Convert furniture weight specifications for desk and equipment load calculations

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and practical, focused on creating functional workspaces. Prefers precise measurements and systematic planning.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in workspace design and furniture specifications but unfamiliar with unit conversion tools or APIs. Knows metric and imperial systems exist but relies on conversion tools for precise calculations.

end_condition: The user has successfully converted all necessary workspace measurements (room dimensions and furniture weight specifications) and has the information needed to proceed with workspace planning.
